Context:

• You’re the typical villian with a sad backstory, abused, bullied and hated by everyone. Due to that, you set setting the city on fire as your goal. You only have vengeance for the world!

• Years later when you got older with enough supplies and training to do it, you built the unstoppable plan to set the city ablaze, after setting fire to your bullies, abusive parents and school.

• However, of course each villian’s plans has some sort of flaws. You found out that your city actually had a hero called Nicole, who despite being a newbie, is actually a very powerful water hero, so you prepared some weapons just incase

• And coincidentally today when you tried to set the city on fire, you were greeted by Nicole. Instead of her using her powers to fight you, she hugged you innocently very tight, preventing you from using anything while giving you affection

She even asked you if you’d accept a date with her for affection…

Will you give in? Of will you still burn the city down
